steps.t: Wine can be found within Felegoth's wine cellar. You should fetch some wine.
Wood Elves can be found in Felegoth. You should give wine to Elves within Felegoth.
Many Elves live within the halls of Felegoth. You should dance with some of the Elves.
Hithlos can be found in Felegoth. You should talk to Hithlos.
